Reason_for_Visit.summary: Patient is a 70 y.o. female with a recent diagnosis of right breast ductal carcinoma in situ (DCIS), referred for consideration of adjunct therapy following partial mastectomy.

Clinical_Findings.findings: Intermediate grade DCIS spanning ~5.0 cm, clear surgical margins, no invasive ductal cancer, ER+ (98%), PR+ (90%), no palpable masses, no skin changes, no lymphadenopathy

Current_Medications.current_meds: She is not on any prescription meds, including no drug treatments for her dyslipidemia or impaired glucose tolerance; and she has no known allergies.

Treatment_Goals.response_assessment: Not yet on treatment — no response to assess.

Response_Assessment.response_assessment: Not yet on treatment — no response to assess.
Response_Assessment.surgical_history: partial mastectomy for biopsy proven DCIS
Response_Assessment.family_history: two sisters in their 50s, plus multiple aunts in their 50s and a niece in her 40s with breast cancer
Response_Assessment.genetic_testing: negative for any pathogenic variant sequences

hormonal therapy.summary: Aromatase inhibitor (e.g. Arimidex) for 5 years after XRT to reduce risk to 5-8% and provide lifelong chemoprotectant benefit for her uninvolved (left) breast
hormonal therapy.Long term side_effects_discussed: MSS and bone density complications, which can be mitigated with bisphosphonate therapy

radiotherapy.summary: XRT +/- endocrine therapy to minimize her future risk of recurrent DCIS or progression to invasive ductal cancer over next decade

bone therapy.summary: Bisphosphonate therapy to mitigate bone density complications of aromatase inhibitor therapy

Medication_Plan.medication_plan: She will consider adjuvant endocrine therapy (e.g. aromatase inhibitor like Arimidex) for 5 years after XRT, and will plan to take bisphosphonate therapy to mitigate the risk of bone density complications.

Therapy_plan.therapy_plan: She is inclined toward undertaking additional adjuvant treatment(s) to minimize her risks over the next decade of recurrent DCIS or progression to invasive breast cancer.
Therapy_plan.adjuvant_treatment: XRT and endocrine therapy, specifically an aromatase inhibitor like Arimidex
Therapy_plan.bisphosphonate_therapy: to mitigate the risk of bone density complications from aromatase inhibitor therapy

Procedure_Plan.procedure_plan: Rad Onc and Med Onc evaluation, right breast XRT, and endocrine therapy
